basic_details.job_title: Chennai Port Authority Executive Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Chennai Port Authority Executive Engineer (Elec.) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Chennai Port Authority Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max age 35 years for direct recruitment, but not applicable for absorption/deputation.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 35 years for direct recruitment. Age relaxation is not applicable for absorption/deputation.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or equivalent in Mechanical/Electrical/Electronics & Communication Engineering or Diploma in Mechanical/Electrical/Electronics & Communication Engineering with 5 years experience.
qualification.details: Executive Engineer (Elec.) (Class I): Degree or equivalent in Mechanical/Electrical/Electronics & Communication Engineering from a recognized university/institution. Diploma in Mechanical/Electrical/Electronics & Communication Engineering from a recognized university/institution. Five years experience in relevant discipline in executive cadre in an Industrial/Commercial/Govt. Undertaking.

salary_details.details: Pay scale of Rs.50000-160000 (Revised) for Executive Engineer (Elec.) (Class I).

selection_process: Online Application Portal (OAP) submission Forwarding of application through proper channel Verification of documents
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Chennai Port Authority Executive Engineer (Elec.) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.chennaiport.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Chennai Port Authority Executive Engineer (Elec.) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the Chennai Port Authority Executive Engineer (Elec.) recruitment is 15th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Executive Engineer (Elec.) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree or equivalent in Mechanical/Electrical/Electronics & Communication Engineering, or a Diploma in the same fields with five years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years for direct recruitment. However, this age limit is not applicable for candidates applying on absorption or deputation basis.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Executive Engineer (Elec.) position?
faq.answer: The revised pay scale for the Executive Engineer (Elec.) post is Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 1,60,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it, attach necessary documents, and send it to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Executive Engineer (Elec.) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application?
faq.answer: The application mode is offline. Candidates are required to submit a physical copy of their application form.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Executive Engineer (Elec.) post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Online Application Portal (OAP) submission, forwarding of the application through the proper channel, and verification of documents.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Chennai Port Authority, which is www.chennaiport.gov.in.
